criteria.subject: Patched config no longer calls missing ColorizerAttachToBuffer command
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-1. Verification: `lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` no longer executes `vim.cmd("ColorizerAttachToBuffer")` in the custom callback.
criteria.evidence: Ran `grep -F 'ColorizerAttachToBuffer' /Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` and found 0 matches. The file no longer calls the missing `ColorizerAttachToBuffer` command.

criteria.subject: Patch does not replace plugins with destructive rewrite
criteria.description: [E] Anti-criterion from scope boundary. Verification: the implementation keeps the existing plugin choices and avoids broad rewrite or removal.
criteria.evidence: Read `tailwind-tools.lua` after patch: both plugin specs remain present (`roobert/tailwindcss-colorizer-cmp.nvim` and `NvChad/nvim-colorizer.lua`). Negative check found 0 plugin removals or rewrites; only callback body changed.

criteria.subject: Opening buffers no longer raises ColorizerAttachToBuffer E492 error
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-1 at runtime. Verification: launching Neovim and opening a target buffer no longer reports `Vim:E492: Not an editor command: ColorizerAttachToBuffer`.
criteria.evidence: Runtime check: ran `nvim --headless '+edit /Users/lgertel/dotfiles/site/src/styles/custom.css' '+edit /Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua' '+qa' 2>&1`. Output flags were `__HAS_ATTACH_ERR__=0` and `__HAS_E492__=0`, exit code `0`. Opening buffers no longer raised the prior `ColorizerAttachToBuffer` / `E492` error. Unrelated `&termguicolors must be set` noise appeared, but it was not the previous failure.

criteria.subject: Requested deliverable is a minimal Neovim configuration patch
criteria.description: [E] Deliverable type validation: Gertel requested an implementation patch, not another diagnosis or a broad refactor. Verification: the work product is a code change in the custom Neovim config that targets the diagnosed error.
criteria.evidence: Edited `/Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` and verified with `git diff --no-ext-diff -- nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` showing exactly one behavioral substitution. Deliverable is a minimal config patch, not a diagnosis-only response.

criteria.subject: Custom tailwind-tools.lua remains the primary edited target file
criteria.description: [I] Verification: the patch is implemented in `lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`, with no unrelated Neovim config files edited unless strictly required.
criteria.evidence: Primary edit target was `/Users/lgertel/dotfiles/nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`. `git diff --name-only --no-ext-diff` listed 3 modified files total in the repo, but only 1 Neovim config file: `nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`. PASS.

criteria.subject: Replacement callback uses supported colorizer Lua API only
criteria.description: [I] Verification: the patch uses `require("colorizer").attach_to_buffer(...)` or another supported Lua API instead of an unavailable editor command.
criteria.evidence: Read the patched file and verified line 24 now calls supported Lua API `nvchadcolorizer.attach_to_buffer(0)`. `grep -F 'attach_to_buffer(0)'` returned 1 match in the callback. No editor-command wrapper remains.

criteria.subject: Tailwind colorizer plugin setup remains present after patch
criteria.description: [I] Verification: the file still configures `tailwindcss-colorizer-cmp` after the fix, preserving the existing Tailwind/colorizer setup intent.
criteria.evidence: Ran `grep -F 'tailwindcolorizer.setup'` on `tailwind-tools.lua` and found the setup block still present at lines 18-20 with `color_square_width = 2`. Tailwind colorizer setup was preserved after patch.

criteria.subject: Patch scope is minimal within custom Neovim configuration
criteria.description: [E] Covers EX-2. Verification: the diff is limited to the diagnosed custom config behavior and does not introduce broad structural changes.
criteria.evidence: `git diff --no-ext-diff -- nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` shows a 1-line substitution only: `vim.cmd("ColorizerAttachToBuffer")` -> `nvchadcolorizer.attach_to_buffer(0)`. Actual changed Neovim config lines: 1. Threshold for minimal scope: keep to diagnosed behavior only. PASS.

criteria.subject: Unrelated Neovim configuration files remain unmodified by patch
criteria.description: [E] Anti-criterion covering EX-3. Verification: no unrelated config files are changed in the implementation diff.
criteria.evidence: Negative scope check: `git diff --name-only --no-ext-diff` listed 3 modified repo files, of which unrelated Neovim config files changed = 0. The only Neovim config file in the diff is `nvim/.config/nvim/lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua`. PASS.

criteria.subject: Diagnosis names a concrete failing config rather than vague advice
criteria.description: [E] Anti-criterion from scope boundary. Verification: the response identifies a specific file and failing command rather than generic troubleshooting guidance.
criteria.evidence: Verified against MAKE response text and file read: response names the concrete failing config `lua/sethy/plugins/tailwind-tools.lua` and exact command `vim.cmd("ColorizerAttachToBuffer")`, rather than generic troubleshooting guidance.
